critical_issues.issue: Win rate only 0% across 4 closed trades
critical_issues.impact: Portfolio is losing money faster than random chance
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediate: Disable auto-trading. Run full calibration analysis before proceeding.

critical_issues.impact: Claude is finding false 'mispricings' at market extremes where pricing is most efficient
critical_issues.recommendation: Add confidence ceiling: require 15% edge (not 10%) for markets <5% or >95% probability

critical_issues.impact: Consistent losses in GENERAL category indicates systematic bias
critical_issues.recommendation: Reduce confidence threshold for GENERAL by 20%, or disable category entirely

critical_issues.impact: Consistent losses in CRYPTO category indicates systematic bias
critical_issues.recommendation: Reduce confidence threshold for CRYPTO by 20%, or disable category entirely

auto_implement.name: Category Confidence Ceiling

auto_implement.name: Elite Wallet Veto
auto_implement.description: Disable trades where elite wallets disagree with Claude
auto_implement.estimated_impact: Medium: Prevents contrarian bets when smart money disagrees
